name: bot-012-news-presenter
description: Make a news video end-to-end from a single request. Take a news announcement (pasted text OR a URL), structure it into a faithful NewsDoc, then render a styled MP4 (Headline Highlight, Breaking News, Kinetic Typography, or Minimal Editorial) at any aspect ratio (16:9, 9:16, 1:1). This is the ONE do-everything entry point for the news-presenter bot — use it whenever someone wants a news video and does not want to think about steps. It orchestrates the granular skills (bot-012-news-structure then bot-012-news-video) and never fabricates facts.

inputs.name: announcement-text
inputs.description: Pasted headline and/or body of the announcement. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: source-url
inputs.description: A URL to the announcement; fetched + extracted. One of text/url is required.

inputs.name: style
inputs.description: headline-highlight | breaking-news | kinetic-typography | minimal-editorial. Default = the NewsDoc's recommended style, else minimal-editorial.

inputs.name: aspect-ratios
inputs.description: Any of 16:9, 9:16, 1:1 (space/comma separated). Default = onboarding default, else 9:16.

inputs.name: brand
inputs.description: Brand accent color (hex) plus optional accentAlt and a short label. Default from context.md, else neutral.

outputs.name: newsdoc
outputs.description: The structured, provenance-tracked NewsDoc (the render contract).

outputs.name: storyboard
outputs.description: Scenes + frame ranges + on-screen text + style/AR/defaults used.

outputs.name: videos
outputs.description: One rendered MP4 per requested aspect ratio.
